narrative:
Precinct Rootstown C (precinct in Portage County) has 854 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
